'''Wena Havid'''<ref name="Re-Animated Part 2">{{SW|url=news/the-droids-re-animated-part-2|series=The Droids Re-Animated|text=Part 2|nolive=1}}</ref> was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] ''panjandram'', or [[Senator/Legends|senator]], of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. He represented [[Kalarba/Legends|Kalarba]].

For a time, he was the [[Governor/Legends|governor]] of Kalarba and the owner of [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]]. A roaming governor, he flitted across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] in a luxurious [[Starship/Legends|vessel]], indulging in his extravagant tastes and racking up outrageous expense reports. When news of his excesses reached his superiors on Kalarba, he was forced to pay back millions of [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]], and most of his possession were put up for auction. C-3PO and R2-D2 were purchased by a [[Unidentified junk trader|junk trader]] at rock-bottom prices.<ref name="Golden Droid">''[[C-3PO: Tales of the Golden Droid]]''</ref>
